title: Pelusillas
description: *Pelusillas* is a **real-time multiplayer web card game** inspired by *Zirkus Flohcati*, a push-your-luck game for 2–6 players where collecting sets of flea circus performers risks busting your hand.

I built the game with **RoboJS** and **React**, using **@robojs/sync** for real-time multiplayer state synchronization and **Zustand** for client-side state management. The project features AI opponents with an extensible strategy system that allows anyone to contribute new AI behaviors.
The game is containerized with **Docker** and pre-configured for **Google Cloud Run** deployment, making it easy to host and share with friends.
imageAlt: Pelusillas card game logo with colorful dust bunny characters
